title: Room Full of Cheese
description:
This room is full of [b][jitter]cheese!!![/jitter][/b]

You look around to see if there are any traps and above you is... more [b]cheese[/b]. The candles in this room appear to be made of [b]cheese[/b]. The furniture is also [b]cheese[/b].
Suddenly, the door behind you slams shut.

It is made of [b]cheese[/b].

options.title: Gorge
options.description: Choose [blue]2[/blue] of [blue]8[/blue] random [gold]Common[/gold] cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

notes:
[b]Gorge[/b]: When selected, displays flavor text: 'You take a little nibble of [b]cheese[/b] but this fuels you to eat even more [b]cheese[/b].' before the card selection. You choose 2 cards from 8 randomly generated [gold]Common[/gold] cards from your character's card pool. After selection, shows: 'You have eaten an awe-inspiring amount of [b]cheese[/b]. Tonight, dreams will be [b]cheese[/b].'

[b]Search[/b]: Deals [red]14[/red] HP of unblockable, unpowered damage and grants the [gold]Chosen Cheese[/gold] relic. Displays flavor text: 'You scrounge about for [sine]hours and hours...[/sine] Time slips by as your mind travels to strange places from the sheer presence of all this [b]cheese[/b], and you fade into a stupor.... You snap awake and realize you're holding something. [b]The Chosen Cheese.[/b]'
